mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `inventory` ( goods_id, warehouse_id, location, batch_no, qty_on_hand, qty_available, locked_qty, total_cost, last_inbound_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{goodsId}, #{warehouseId}, #{location}, IFNULL(#{batchNo}, ''), #{qtyOnHand}, #{qtyAvailable}, IFNULL(#{lockedQty}, 0), #{totalCost}, #{lastInboundTime}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE `inventory` SET qty_on_hand = qty_on_hand + #{qty}, qty_available = qty_available + #{qty}, total_cost = total_cost + #{costDelta}, last_inbound_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE `inventory` SET qty_on_hand = qty_on_hand - #{qty}, qty_available = qty_available - #{qty}, total_cost = GREATEST(0, total_cost - #{costDelta}), last_outbound_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND qty_available >= #{qty}
